description: European healthcare scheduling platform operating in 15+ countries. Patients can find doctors, book appointments, and manage healthcare online. Operates brands including ZnanyLekarz, Doctoralia, MioDottore, TopDoctors, and DocPlanner.
business_model: B2B - Subscription to healthcare providers, marketplace to patients
target_market: Healthcare providers in Europe and Latin America
key_investors: Goldman Sachs Growth, One Peak Partners
competitive_advantage: European market leader, multi-country presence, strong network effects

varden_fit.rationale: European scheduling infrastructure - demonstrates pan-European opportunity
